label: SES-033 v0.5 slice C build-execution closeout: 1 session, 0 decisions, 0 planning items, 5 references

session.title: v0.5 slice C — engagement management panel UI
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code conversation against the slice prompt at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-C-engagement-management-panel.md. Third of five v0.5 build slices. Single-commit session landing at d11b8c6. No transcript preserved per DEC-025.
session.topics_covered:
Seed prompt: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-C-engagement-management-panel.md. Four categories of work executed on top of slices A and B: the engagement management panel as a ListDetailPanel subclass registered as the single entry in the Engagements sidebar group (the empty group container was introduced in slice A); CRUD dialogs as EntityCrudDialog subclasses; the delete dialog with forbid-active-engagement behavior per PRD §5.6 including the only-engagement edge case; and refresh-service registration subscribing the panel to both the db-export/meta/engagements.json file-watch signal and the active_engagement_changed Qt signal from ActiveEngagementContext.

Engagement panel (ui/panels/engagements.py): master pane with five sortable columns per PRD §5.1 — Identifier (mono 80px), Code (mono 100px), Name (body flexible), Status (body with status-aware coloring active/paused/archived), Last Opened (relative-date formatted via format_relative_date helper handling 'N minutes/hours/days ago' / 'YYYY-MM-DD' / '—' cases). Default sort Last Opened descending with soft-deleted rows sorting to the bottom. Active-engagement marker — left accent bar plus prepended Lucide check icon on the Identifier column — compares against ActiveEngagementContext.engagement_identifier(). Soft-deleted row treatment in neutral.500 text with prepended Lucide trash-2 icon, gated behind a 'Show soft-deleted' checkbox that toggles the panel's client.list_engagements(include_deleted=True) call. Right-click context menu with New / Edit / Delete / Restore (Restore appears only on soft-deleted rows). The menu does NOT include Activate — the picker (slice D) is the switching gesture per PRD §5.2. Detail pane with form fields per engagement.md §3.6.3.

CRUD dialogs (ui/dialogs/engagement_crud.py): EngagementCreateDialog (all fields editable; identifier auto-assigned by API on POST when omitted) and EngagementEditDialog (engagement_code read-only since rename is v0.6+ candidate per PRD Out of Scope). Field schema sourced from a new shared _engagement_schema.py module.

Delete dialog (ui/dialogs/engagement_delete.py): EntityCrudDeleteDialog subclass implementing PRD §5.6's forbid-active-delete. When the row to delete is the active engagement, the dialog presents a special state with two inert TODO-placeholder buttons (Switch engagement / Create engagement) that slice D will rewire. The last-engagement edge case is handled — when the only existing engagement is the active one, the dialog presents the Create-engagement affordance as the recovery path.

Refresh registration via ui/refresh.py — extended to wire engagements panel as subscriber to the file-watch signal from slice A and to the active_engagement_changed Qt signal. ui/main_window.py extended to host the new panel entry. ui/sidebar.py updated to populate the Engagements group entry that slice A added as an empty container.

Test suite: extensive UI test coverage added — tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_engagements_panel.py (516 lines), test_engagement_crud_dialogs.py (355 lines), updates to test_smoke.py and conftest.py covering master-pane rendering, sort behavior, status-aware coloring, active-engagement marker, soft-deleted treatment, context menu actions, CRUD dialog field validation, forbid-active-delete with last-engagement edge case.
session.artifacts_produced:
Commit d11b8c6 on origin/main — v2: v0.5 slice C — engagement management panel UI (master/detail panel, CRUD dialogs, forbid-active-delete with last-engagement edge case). Created crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/panels/engagements.py (645 lines); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/dialogs/_engagement_schema.py (104 lines); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/dialogs/engagement_crud.py (154 lines); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/dialogs/engagement_delete.py (214 lines). Modified crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/{app.py, main_window.py, sidebar.py, refresh.py}. Added tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_engagements_panel.py (516 lines), test_engagement_crud_dialogs.py (355 lines); modifications to tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/{conftest.py, test_smoke.py}. 2057 insertions, 7 deletions across 12 files.

No PRD changes; no decisions or planning items written; no version bump.
session.in_flight_at_end: Slice D (engagement switching, top-strip, picker, single-gesture creation+activation) is next per the v0.5 implementation plan. The slice-C inert 'Switch engagement' and 'Create engagement' buttons in engagement_delete.py are TODO-placeholders for slice D to rewire — slice D will hook the Switch-engagement button to open the new picker widget and the Create-engagement button to launch the new NewEngagementDialog single-gesture flow. Slice prompt at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-D-engagement-switching.md.
